heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6710 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $6,000,000,000 for the period ending , to carry out this chapter.December 31, 1978
notes: Amendments1977— substituted “$6,000,000,000 for the period ending ” for “$2,000,000,000 for the period ending ”.Pub. L. 95–28December 31, 1978September 30, 1977

Immediate Initiation of Construction on Certain Projects, , , directed Secretary of Agriculture and Secretary of the Interior to immediately initiate construction of those Federal public works projects which are responsibility of their respective departments, which have been authorized, and which can be commenced within 60 days of , and completed no later than 180th day after commencement of construction, with no funds authorized by this section used to carry out such works.Pub. L. 95–28, title I, § 11191 Stat. 120May 13, 1977May 13, 1977
